reviews.review_description: i suggest this game to many people that love music and loves to make music. not only you can make music with your voice also make with pianos.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! I'm glad that you enjoy making music with your voice and all the different sounds available. More tutorials and big updates are coming soon.

reviews.review_description: This is unacceptable cause it's not letting me play and I bought it too.

developer_response.body:
Hi, I’m really sorry you’re experiencing this. That definitely shouldn’t be happening.

Since you’re on version 1.0.7, please try fully closing the app and restarting your headset, then launching BOCLAA XR again. If the issue continues, please email me at contact@zacharyaghaizu.com with your headset model and what happens when you try to play, and I’ll help you fix this as quickly as possible.

Thanks for your patience.

Hi, there is a built in tutorial in the menu "?" symbol. Also Check My BOCLAA XR tutorials playlist where more tutorials are being added. If you are still struggling, I recommend trying out the BOCLAA mobile version first to gain the basic understanding. Please send an email if there is anything specific that you want to learn contact@zacharyaghaizu.com

reviews.review_description: This is a good app for making music! 5 star

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the 5 stars, I really appreciate it. I’m glad you’re enjoying making music with BOCLAA XR. More updates and features are on the way. 🙌

reviews.review_description: No good instructions laggy and no clear tutorial

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for the feedback, I really appreciate you trying BOCLAA XR.

There’s a walkthrough tutorial inside the menu (tap the “?” icon) available in multiple languages that covers the basics. If you’ve used the mobile version before, the workflow should feel similar.

I’ve also just released an update that addresses performance and lag issues, so please make sure you’re on the latest version.

As this is a new release, more tutorials and guides are coming soon on the BOCLAA XR tutorials playlist. If you’re still experiencing issues, feel free to email contact@zacharyaghaizu.com  I’m happy to help directly.

Thanks again for the feedback 🙌
